title: Agentic CRM
subtitle: AI-Orchestrated Customer Intelligence
description: A fully interactive prototype showing how autonomous AI agents can orchestrate churn prevention, pipeline optimization, and revenue protection — with human-in-the-loop approvals.

title: Jarvis Presenter
subtitle: AI-Powered Presentation Intelligence
description: An interactive AI prototype that transforms how presentations are built, delivered, and adapted in real time — powered by intelligent agents that understand context, audience, and narrative flow.

title: 6G Monetisation Engine
subtitle: Agentic BSS Monetisation for 6G
description: An interactive Matrix-style prototype for exploring 6G B2B and B2A offers, then launching them through supervised AI agents that model pricing, settlement, carbon guardrails, approvals, and live telemetry.
